name: update url
description: Set the update URL and reboot to apply

name: update check
description: Refresh update metadata from the configured URL

name: update apply
description: Force refresh and apply pending update

name: update url get
description: Read the current update URL from the device

name: migrate
description: Run migration for the given stage and reboot

name: factory reset
description: Archive logs then factory reset the device

name: version
description: Show firmware / build information

name: info
description: Show device and base station information

name: reboot
description: Reboot the device

name: serial
description: Read serial number via caliget (implementation always passes sn)

name: log level
description: Set device log level

name: log tail
description: Stream or show recent logs

name: log save
description: Archive logs on the device

name: log pull
description: Archive logs then pull archive to optional local path

name: flash
description: Flash firmware via fw_wizard (Artifactory + local server; no CLI arguments)

name: wifi connect
description: Connect to Wi‑Fi and fetch IP

name: mfg get
description: Read manufacturing calibration field

name: mfg set
description: Write manufacturing calibration field

name: mfg build
description: Show build info (manufacturing context)

name: push arlod
description: Push arlod file via ADB (Python-implemented, no raw catalog sequence)
